title: Scaling Front ends with Micro-Frontend Architecture

questions.sentence: As enterprise organizations scale large monolithic front end applications often become difficult to maintain and deploy
MicroFrontend Architecture addresses this by breaking a large application into smaller independent and loosely coupled sub applications
Each micro front end can be developed tested and deployed by a different team using their own choice of technology stack
These independent units are then integrated into a single Host or Shell application that manages routing and shared state
While micro front ends offer greater flexibility and faster deployment cycles they introduce significant challenges in terms of governance consistent styling and bundle size
